items.title: VAR official says hand gesture was 'involuntary, subconscious twitch'
items.summary: Video assistant referee Shaun Evans has denied "intentionally" making a hand gesture "to communicate a message, affiliation, game or belief of any kind" and claimed it was a "an involuntary, subconscious twitch" that he was "unaware" of.

items.title: World Cup official cleared by Fifa and says gesture was ‘subconscious twitch’
items.summary: Evans had been accused of white supremacist gesture ‘The movement was an involuntary,’ says official Fifa’s disciplinary committee has cleared the World Cup video assistant referee Shaun Evans after he was accused of making a hand gesture associated with white supremacists. items.title: Lukaku makes impact off the bench as Belgium draw with Egypt
items.summary: An own goal from Mohamed Hany denies Egypt a first ever victory at the World Cup as they draw 1-1 with Belgium at the Seattle Stadium.

items.title: 'Greatest feeling ever': Cape Verdeans tell BBC of joy at holding Spain to draw
items.summary: The streets of the capital, Praia, shook with wild celebrations as the small island nation held Spain to a shock 0-0 draw.
